description_long: This playground structure features a wooden playhouse elevated on stilts, with a red gabled roof and a small chimney. The front includes a staircase with railings leading up to a deck, and a slide descends from one side. There is a swing set attached to the left, supported by sturdy wooden beams, and a climbing wall with red grips on the right side. The playhouse has a small balcony with a protective railing and a window adorned with flower boxes. The entire structure is set on a grassy base, providing a safe play area for children.
description: A wooden multi-play structure with an elevated playhouse, slide, swing set, climbing wall, and balcony, all set on a grassy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the staircase, balcony, swing set, and main entrance to the playhouse.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slide and climbing wall with red grips, as well as the roof's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the playhouse, the balcony, and the open area beneath the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slide, swing set, and the side of the playhouse with its window.
